segments.text: I think it comes out pretty often, so...
segments.original_text: かなり起きるのかなと思っているので

segments.text: Honestly, I think any option works
segments.original_text: 正直色はどれでもいいのかなと思ってます

segments.text: Making it look like going all-in on the purple tech
segments.original_text: 紫処理に全力と見せかけて

full_text: I think it comes out pretty often, so... Honestly, I think any option works. Oh. Making it look like going all-in on the purple tech. Right away.
